sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34984" key="e)narguri/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐναργῠρ-ίζω</orth>, <sense id="n34984.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be of silvery appearance</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:1:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.24</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
